name: Randall Coleman
bio: Randall Coleman serves as the County Attorney for Newton County, handling criminal prosecutions and providing legal counsel to the county. He works to ensure justice and public safety in one of the most rural counties in East Texas.
campaignPromises: Provide effective prosecution of criminal cases
Protect the legal interests of Newton County
Support victims of crime and their families
Operate a fiscally responsible county attorney's office
Work with law enforcement on community safety
